arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: How does Harry Maguire feel about contract situation?
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire is reportedly still waiting to learn whether he will have his contract extended at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face nightmare Bukayo Saka scenario as Mikel Arteta makes 'next Cristiano Ronaldo' claim
arts.sum: Premier League rules state that players who receive a total of five yellow cards over the first 19 games will be given a one-match ban. If a player is booked 10 times across the first 32 Premier League matches of the season, they will be suspended for two games .

arts.ttl: 'Needs to be addressed' - Luke Shaw learns Man Utd decision as injury nightmare comes to a head
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (David Prince, Manchester Evening News readers)
arts.sum: Luke Shaw has been ruled out of Manchester United's Premier League clash with Arsenal on Thursday night after the left-back suffered a fresh injury setback

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand and Arsenal star agree over what Bukayo Saka must do next in his career
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand and Jorginho have identified one area of Bukayo Saka's game which is in need of improvement and could take the impressive Arsenal academy product to the next level

arts.ttl: Havertz says Arsenal teammate can ‘turn games on his own’
arts.sum: Kai Havertz has called Martin Odegaard ‘magic’ and said the Arsenal captain can ‘turn games around on his own’. Odegaard’s return from injury has coincided with Arsenal’s improvement in results and performances. The Gunners have won three straight games since the international break, scoring 13 goals during victories over Nottingham Forest, Sporting Lisbon and West […] The post Havertz says Arsenal teammate can ‘turn games on his own’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Danish Football Union send clear warning to Manchester United ace Chido Obi-Martin
arts.sum: Man United youngster Chido Obi-Martin qualifies to play for Denmark, Nigeria and England at international level.
